narrative:
Precinct Venice Township (precinct in Seneca County) has 562 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.6 percentage points.
